params.message: conda create -y -n inferno_env python=3.10 || conda install -y -n inferno_env python=3.10
conda install -y -n inferno_env -c conda-forge ffmpeg=4.3.1 aubio pydub
conda run -n inferno_env python -m pip install --isolated -r requirements.txt
